inline.body:
_⚠️ Potential issue_

The `mean()` call on line 42 does not pass `na.rm = TRUE`. This will return `NA` if any values are missing.

```suggestion
mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
```

_🧹 Nitpick_

Consider renaming `tmp` to a more descriptive variable name.

_🔒 Security_

Credentials are logged in plain text on line 12. Remove this before merging.
This function returns a value but the caller never checks it.

summary.body:
## Walkthrough

This PR adds new analysis functions. Overall the changes look good.

_📝 Nitpick_: The module-level docstring could be improved.
